allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Path src -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Write-Output "---package.json---"; Get-Content package.json)

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker; $imgs = Select-String -Path src\\lib\\mock-data.ts -Pattern 'images\\.unsplash\\.com/photo-\([a-z0-9-]+\)' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }; Write-Output "Total image refs: $\($imgs.Count\)"; Write-Output "Unique image refs: $\(@\($imgs | Sort-Object -Unique\).Count\)"; Write-Output "--- Duplicates \(should be none\): ---"; $imgs | Group-Object | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Count\)x  $\($_.Name\)" })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker; Write-Output "Property image arrays:"; Select-String -Path src\\lib\\mock-data.ts -Pattern 'images: propertyImages\\\(\(\\d+\)\\\)' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value }; Write-Output "`nResulting unique image count: 10 properties x 5 themes = 50 unique URLs \(locks 10-104\)")
PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker; npm run type-check 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker; npm run type-check 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'error TS' | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; npm run type-check 2>&1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "frontend tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\Lenovo\\Projects\\ai-real-estate-matchmaker\\backend; $env:DATABASE_URL="sqlite://"; python -c "from app.main import app; p=app.openapi\(\)['paths']; print\('total routes:', len\(p\)\); print\('off-plan:', [k for k in p if '/projects' in k]\); print\('leads:', [k for k in p if '/leads' in k]\)")
